scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -f dist/server.js ]; then node dist/server.js; else node --import tsx server.ts; fi'
scripts.test: sh -c 'set -e; files=$(find . -not -path "./node_modules/*" -name "*.test.ts" -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No server tests found"; exit 0; fi; node --import tsx --test $files'
scripts.test:nonport: sh -c 'set -e; files=$(find . -not -path "./node_modules/*" -name "*.test.ts" ! -name "galleryWalkRoutes.test.ts" ! -name "sessionStore.test.ts" ! -name "statusRoute.test.ts" -print); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No server tests found"; exit 0; fi; node --import tsx --test $files'
